task_goal: Extract dialogue and interaction signals between Character/Object entities from the input text. Results must only use entities provided in the entity list.
global_constraints: Do NOT invent entities that are not in the provided entity list.
Only use interaction_type values defined in the interaction schema.
Both dialogue and interaction details must be written into the content field.
When interaction_type=dialogue and it is monologue/self-talk, object can be an empty string.
When object is of type Object, only use interactive/agentive objects (e.g., robot/AI/system agents); do not use passive props or background items (curtain, door, table, etc.) as object.
When interaction_type=interaction, polarity is required and must be one of positive/negative/neutral.
Output JSON array only, without commentary or extra text.

group_constraints: Only extract when the text explicitly expresses speech or interaction behavior; avoid speculation.
If the interaction target is an Object, ensure it has interaction capability (robot/AI/system entity); otherwise skip the record.
